prestazioni: Engine swap to a **426 Hemi (RB-E493)** crate motor from **Floyd Garrett Muscle Cars**, bored to 432ci with forged **Manley 4340 steel crankshaft (4.25" stroke)**, **Diamond Racing pistons (12.5:1 compression)**, and **Crower billet connecting rods**. Paired with a **Holley Dominator 1150 CFM carburetor** on an **Edelbrock Victor Jr. intake manifold**, tuned for 650+ HP on **VP Racing Q16 fuel**.

Full **Hooker Super Competition 2.5" headers** with 3.5" dual exhaust and **Flowmaster Super 44 mufflers (3-chamber design)** for aggressive tone without drone. **MSD 6AL ignition system** with **Blaster 2 coil** and **Taylor 8.8mm ThunderVolt wires** for precise spark control.

Suspension overhaul with **Detroit Speed Quadralink rear suspension (DSE 010200)** and **Ridetech HQ Series coilovers (front/rear adjustable damping)**. **Baer 6P Extreme+ 13" front brake kit** with **Wilwood Dynalite 4-piston calipers** and **StopTech slotted rotors** for 1970-specific hubs. **BFGoodrich g-Force Rival S 2 275/40R17 (front) and 315/35R17 (rear)** on **American Racing Torq Thrust II 17x9" and 17x12" wheels**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit (PB-002 1970 Charger-specific)** with **custom carbon fiber fenders (3M matte vinyl wrap in "Plum Crazy" with gold pearl flakes)**. **Shaker hood scoop (OEM-style but fabricated from aluminum by **Challenger Chassis**) with **LED halo lighting** integrated into the underside.

**RetroSound Bluetooth radio (model M70-RS)** hidden behind a **custom billet aluminum dashboard** (fabricated by **Hot Rods & Custom Stuff**) with **AutoMeter Pro Comp Ultra-Lite gauges (160 mph speedo, 10k RPM tach, oil/fuel pressure)**. **Ididit tilt steering column** with a **Grant Classic woodgrain steering wheel**.

**Lakewood 3-point roll bar (chrome-moly, bolt-in, 1970-specific)** with **Sparco 6-point harnesses (50th Anniversary edition)**. **Custom leather interior by **Paul Atkins Interiors** in **black Nappa leather with purple stitching**, featuring **Recaro SRD seats (1970 Charger-specific mounts)** and **Dynamat Xtreme sound deadening** for cabin refinement.
